title: T-023 — SCN-home workflow launcher menu (06-a)
prompt:
# T-023 — SCN-home menu

PRD: docs/prd/06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-FE-005
UX: prototypes/design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:290-323 §3.6
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:7-61 (label home_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver SCN-home as a 3-section grid (Produkcja / Magazyn / Jakość) where each tile is role-filtered via T-016 and shows an icon 46dp + 14px label + 11px subtitle. WO and QC tiles carry a counter badge.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/page.tsx` (Server Component) reads session, computes visible tiles per role.
2. Tile data table keyed to permission map (T-016) — Produkcja: Work Order (badge=active WO count), Pick dla WO; Magazyn: Przyjęcie PO, Przyjęcie TO, Putaway, Przesuń LP, Split LP, Part Movement P2; Jakość: Inspekcja QC (badge=pending count), Inwentaryzacja P2.
3. Reads counters from `/api/production/scanner/active-wos` (count only) and `/api/quality/scanner/pending-inspections` (count only).

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/home-grid.client.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-home.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:7-61`, then it has the 3 sections in order Produkcja / Magazyn / Jakość with the same tile order, the same icon-label-subtitle layout, and the same counter badge placement on Work Order + Inspekcja QC — RTL snapshot + manual checklist (structural + visual + interaction parity)
2. Given a session with only warehouse.operator role, when the page renders, then production tiles and quality tiles are hidden but the Magazyn section still shows all six warehouse tiles
3. Given a 'denied=warehouse.receive' query param is present, when the page renders, then an amber warn banner is shown above the grid with the workflow name

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-home.test.tsx asserting parity + role-filter + denial banner before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-home'

## Risk red lines
- Do not show Phase-2 tiles as active (must remain disabled with 'P2' badge)
- Do not block render if counter API calls fail (degrade tiles to no-badge)
- Do not display tiles outside the user's role set

pipeline_inputs.description: Role-filtered 3-section workflow launcher with WO + QC counter badges and denial banner support.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) 3 sections in order Produkcja, Magazyn, Jakość.
2) Same tile order as home_screen prototype.
3) Icon 46dp + 14px label + 11px subtitle.
4) Counter badge on Work Order + Inspekcja QC.
5) P2 tiles rendered disabled with 'P2' badge.
6) Denial banner via query param renders above grid.
out_of_scope: Do not implement counter endpoints here (T-038 active-WOs, T-045 QA pending)
Do not implement actual workflow pages here
Do not implement P2 Inwentaryzacja tile content
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:7-61, then it has 3 sections in order Produkcja/Magazyn/Jakość, the same tile order, the same icon-label-subtitle layout, and counter badges on Work Order + Inspekcja QC — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
Given a session with only warehouse.operator role, when the page renders, then production and quality tiles are hidden but Magazyn shows all six warehouse tiles

Given 'denied=warehouse.receive' query param, when the page renders, then an amber warn banner is shown above the grid naming the workflow. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED: write scn-home.test.tsx asserting parity + role filter + denial banner before implementation
For UI parity, capture 390x844 screenshots and Playwright trace/video artifacts; attach artifact paths in closeout per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
risk_red_lines: Do not show P2 tiles as active
Do not block render on counter API failure
Do not display tiles outside user's role set
Do not bypass scanner.* permission namespace when wiring server actions
Do not regress operator-friendly touch targets (>=48dp) or mobile viewport 390x844 evidence
cross_module_dependencies: 02-settings: PIN policy, locale, scanner device defaults
